claimText: Tsinghua University affirms that AI must remain an auxiliary tool and that teachers and students are the primary agents in teaching and learning (principal responsibility principle).
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 「主体责任」原则强调人工智能始终是辅助工具，师生才是教学与学习的主导者。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
